strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience spanning Node.js/TypeScript, React, and multiple backend languages
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in the primary stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java mentioned only briefly for robotic arms and mobile orchestration tooling
No explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright testing frameworks; testing experience leans toward Selenium and D-language tooling
response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years full-stack bar, with concrete TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB delivery at Optilyz and RIDE, plus current AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq that directly maps to the AI agent requirement. Engineering rigor is well-evidenced (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public workshops on web internals and testing). Gaps are on framework specificity: Nest.js and Vitest are not named, and Kotlin exposure is thin, though the polyglot track record (TypeScript, Java, D, C/C++, Python implied via tooling) suggests fast ramp-up. Cloud (AWS CDK) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes via GISCollective) are present. Overall a strong match worth interviewing to validate Nest.js/Kotlin depth.
